title: 400+ pcs Round Resin Buttons Mixed Color, Assorted Sizes (0.7-4cm) for Sewing, Crafts DIY, Button Painting, Easter Egg Fillers - Perfect for Crafters, Teachers & DIY Enthusiasts
features: 【400+ Mixed Color Buttons】This bulk pack includes over 400 round resin buttons in assorted colors (green, blue, red, yellow, pink, etc.), perfect for sewing, crafts, and DIY projects. Random delivery ensures variety for creative use.

【Assorted Sizes (0.7cm-4cm)】Buttons range from 0.7cm (0.28") to 4cm (1.57"), suitable for different crafting needs. Includes both 2-hole and 4-hole buttons, ideal for clothing, handmade ornaments, and school projects.

【Durable & Waterproof Resin Material】Smooth surface, lightweight yet sturdy, can be attached with glue, thread, or ribbons. Safe and non-toxic, but not recommended for children under 3 due to small parts.

【Versatile for Multiple Uses】Great for sewing, button painting, Easter egg fillers, jewelry making, gift wrapping, and holiday decorations (Christmas, Halloween, Thanksgiving). Also useful for teaching kids color sorting and counting.

【Perfect for Crafters & Teachers】Whether you're a DIY enthusiast, seamstress, or educator, these buttons provide endless creative possibilities. Bulk pack ensures you have enough for multiple projects.
